sum: This mod translates the CheatsAreas available via the CLUA console, including those added by other mods.
no: This mod translates the CheatsAreas available via the CLUA console, including those added by other mods.

co.n: Voulez-vous simplement traduire les cartes initialement accessibles dans la CLUAConsole ?
Voulez-vous acceder a toutes les cartes du jeu ainsi qu'aux extensions pendant la campagne principale ?
co.no: Access all game and expansion areas during campaign

co.n: "AREAS CHEATS" pour les cartes ajoutees par des mods
co.no: Add CLUAConsole entries for mod-added areas
